characters.appearance: Young Asian male in his 20s. He has a slim build, fair complexion, and short black hair parted on the side. He has clean facial features with no distinguishing marks.
characters.wardrobe: He wears an olive green jacket over a black shirt. He has white wired earphones plugged in.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, engaging, and persuasive. He uses frequent hand gestures to emphasize his points.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आजकल हर अच्छी job के लिए fluent English ज़रूरी है। [Nowadays fluent English is necessary for every good job.]
Character A says: News reports भी यही कहते हैं कि communication skills सबसे important हैं। [News reports also say that communication skills are the most important.]
Character A says: Corporate world में बिना English के survive करना मुश्किल है। [It's difficult to survive in the corporate world without English.]
Character A says: और जो लोग अच्छी English बोलते हैं, वो तेज़ी से grow करते हैं। [And those who speak good English, they grow fast.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by highlighting the undeniable importance of English for career growth.
- Establishes the core problem using the visual authority of news headlines.
- Sets an urgent but practical tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
fluent English
ज़रूरी है
communication skills
सबसे important हैं
corporate world में
grow fast

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मैं भी पहले English बोलने में बहुत अटकता था, confidence ही नहीं था। [I also used to stumble a lot while speaking English earlier, had no confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Builds empathy and trust by sharing a relatable personal struggle with spoken English.
- Transitions from the macro career trend to a personal pain point.
- Acts as the 'older sibling' sharing their own journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने में
अटकता था
no confidence

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Grammar तो समझ आती थी, पर office में बोलते वक़्त words याद नहीं आते थे। [I understood grammar, but couldn't remember words while speaking in the office.]
Character A says: फिर मैंने तरीका बदला। [Then I changed my approach.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the specific frustration of knowing grammar but failing to speak in real-time.
- Validates the user's current knowledge while pointing out the missing piece (speaking practice).
- Sets up the pivot to the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Grammar समझ आती थी
पर बोलते वक़्त
words याद नहीं आते थे
मैंने तरीका बदला

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मैंने Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ बोलकर practice करना शुरू किया। [I started practicing daily by speaking with Supernova's AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor as the practical, action-oriented solution.
- Emphasizes the core product value: daily speaking practice over passive learning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova AI tutor
के साथ रोज़
बोलकर practice

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova आपको interviews और office meetings के लिए तैयार करता है। [Supernova prepares you for interviews and office meetings.]
Character A says: पीछे मत रहो, अपनी career growth की ज़िम्मेदारी खुद लो। [Don't stay behind, take responsibility for your career growth yourself.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करो। [Download Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the real-world benefits of the app (interviews, meetings).
- Empowers the user to take charge of their career.
- Delivers a strong, encouraging call-to-action without promising a free product.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
interviews और meetings
के लिए तैयार
पीछे मत रहो
आज ही
Supernova download करो
